gallery.title: Daniel & Kevin Wixted — Daniel's Wedding Day
gallery.caption: Brothers Daniel Scott Wixted (white tuxedo, groom) and Kevin Paul Wixted (gray-blue tuxedo), early 1980s — Daniel's wedding day. Sons of Bruce John & Evelyn Ruth Jones Wixted, Rochester NY line.

gallery.title: Baby Kevin with Rod and Bo — July 1956
gallery.caption: July 1956 (date stamp JUL • 56). Kevin Paul Wixted (~3 months old) with Rod (Rodney Henri Wixted) and Bo (Bruce Wixted). Rochester living room — vintage TV, floral curtains. Matthew Scott Wixted's father as an infant.

gallery.title: Bruce & Evelyn Wixted — Young Couple
gallery.caption: Bruce John Wixted and Evelyn Ruth Jones, circa 1954–1957 (est.). Square-format Rochester portrait — Evelyn in a sailor-collar dress, Bruce in a knit polo. Married 8 Dec 1951; Kevin born Apr 1956. Likely early married years before the 1963 move west.

gallery.title: Bruce Wixted Sr. — Young Man (Formal Portrait)
gallery.caption: Bruce John Wixted Sr. in his late teens, light suit and patterned tie. Evelyn Ruth Jones at frame right in formal dress — likely wedding or dance, circa 1950–1951 (est.). Matthew's grandfather before the Rochester family years.
